title: antiphylla majuscula
intro: Antiphylla majuscula, also known as False Dragon's Milk, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the mint family. The medicinal properties of Antiphylla majuscula are attributed to its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction and digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Antiphylla majuscula can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health needs.
